task: Make the backend write a local desktop connection profile at startup so desktop integrations can discover the current backend URL and token without requiring users to copy values manually.
constraints: Do not modify the VS Code bridge in this backend task.
Do not change WebSocket authentication behavior.
Do not commit generated connection profiles or secrets.
The generated profile must live in an ignored local runtime directory.
done_when: Backend startup writes an ignored local JSON profile with backend WS URL, API URL, token, auth mode, expiry, and pairing page.
Tests cover profile payload construction and writing.
Generated profile location is ignored by Git.
